text.title: SaaS Stack Audit Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure: inventory → classify → sign kill-list → execute → review next quarter.

step.name: pull-inventory
step.action: Run `inventory-puller`. Filter recurring SaaS charges. Cross-check with vendor admin panels for last_login_days.
step.decision-gate: If inventory size < 5, run methodology is not applicable; skip.

step.name: classify
step.input: Inventory + active client engagements + last quarter audit
step.action: Run `classifier`. Per tool assign bucket: keep | consolidate | downgrade_seat | suspend | cancel. Identify duplicates via `duplicate_of`.
step.decision-gate: Reject `keep` rows lacking evidence OR `tied_to_revenue: false`.

step.name: sign-kill-list
step.input: Items with bucket in {cancel, suspend, downgrade_seat}
step.action: Founder reviews and signs the kill-list. Signature attached; date recorded.

step.name: execute
step.action: Execute cancellations / downgrades. Notify any affected clients first. Record actual `spend_forecast_after`.

step.name: review-next-quarter
step.input: Last quarter audit + this quarter card export
step.action: Compare forecast vs actual spend. Re-inventory; mark tools that crept back; refine classifier.
